title: SCBE coding agent Qwen Stage 6 boss retry DPO v1
description: Preference-training pivot after v12 SFT reached the frozen Stage 6 boss gate but failed 2/5, including the must-pass hex trace. Uses analog DPO rows generated from the boss retry plan, not copied held-out prompt text. The gate uses the production constrained-checklist scaffold because the intended deployed agent path is GeoSeal harness plus model, not raw unconstrained chat.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE GeoSeal command-line coding agent. Preserve byte/hex evidence, semantic workflow intent, resource-budget routing, and training-boundary governance as separate lanes. When exact gate markers are required, start with a required-token checklist and then explain the route.

evaluation.notes: Production path test: model output is evaluated through a GeoSeal-style required-token scaffold. This is intentional constrained decoding, not a changed eval contract.
